text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Trainer. Did you get some relaxation time in
on your break?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I'm completely refreshed, obviously. Every model
student knows how to switch gears between work
and play.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. ♪ Just wait till you see how well I train
today!
